subject: [UUI] Release new version of server
commit_message:
[UUI] Release new version of server

Issue-ID: USECASEUI-412
Change-Id: I521876aecb95f265ccfc92c8f1d144afd6cbb54c
Signed-off-by: hekeguang <hekeguang@chinamobile.com>
